items.title: Sir Alex Ferguson pays heartbreaking tribute to Kevin Keegan and reveals secret meeting after ‘love it if we beat them’
items.summary: SIR ALEX FERGUSON has admitted he had the "utmost respect" for old rival Kevin Keegan, who passed away on Monday. items.title: Premier League referee Taylor retires with immediate effect
items.summary: Long-serving Premier League referee Anthony Taylor is standing down after 16 years in England's top flight at the conclusion of the World Cup.

items.title: Premier League and World Cup referee Taylor retires
items.summary: Anthony Taylor announces his retirement from refereeing with immediate effect - ending a 20-year career.

items.title: Ferguson says Keegan built Newcastle's greatest team
items.summary: Former Manchester United manager Sir Alex Ferguson says Kevin Keegan "carried the love of the game on his sleeve" as he paid tribute to his former rival.

items.title: Derry City given suspended partial stadium closure by Uefa
items.summary: Derry City are to be issued a suspended partial closure of Ryan McBride Brandywell Stadium by Uefa.

items.title: Celtic & Rangers cited after unrest 'near miss' at Ibrox
items.summary: Rangers and Celtic face disciplinary charges over the unrest that followed their Scottish Cup meeting at Ibrox in March, while an independent review is critical of ultras groups and scathing on planning inadequacies.
